title: Lithium Output at SQM-Codelco Venture Edges Out Forecasts
description: SQM’s lithium partnership with Codelco churned out slightly more of the battery metal than forecast last year as the industry continues to emerge from a global glut.
content: SQM’s lithium partnership with Codelco churned out slightly more of the battery metal than forecast last year as the industry continues to emerge from a global glut.
